title: Lamb Koftas with Saudi Salad
description: Grilled lamb koftas served with a refreshing Saudi salad.

ingredients.name: Saudi Salad
ingredients.notes: A mix of chopped lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine lamb, salt, black pepper, and garlic.
Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers.
Grill the lamb koftas for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the Saudi salad.
In a large bowl, combine the salad ingredients.
In a small bowl, whisk together silky and floral.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Serve the lamb koftas with the Saudi salad.
